embassy.en: She applied for a visa at the embassy.

emerge.en: The sun emerged from behind the clouds.

emphasis.en: The teacher put emphasis on practice.

empire.en: The Roman empire was very powerful.

enclose.en: Please enclose a photo with your form.
enclose.zh: 請隨表格附上一張照片。

encounter.en: We encountered a problem on the way.
encounter.zh: 我們在路上遇到了問題。

endure.en: They had to endure the cold winter.
endure.zh: 他們必須忍受寒冷的冬天。

enforce.en: The police enforce the traffic rules.

enlarge.zh: 你能把這張照片放大嗎？

enormous.en: The whale is an enormous animal.
enormous.zh: 鯨魚是一種巨大的動物。

ensure.en: Please ensure the door is locked.

enthusiasm.en: She showed great enthusiasm for the project.
enthusiasm.zh: 她對這個專案展現極大的熱情。

equality.en: They fought for equality and justice.
equality.zh: 他們為平等與正義而奮鬥。

equip.en: The room is equipped with a computer.
equip.zh: 這個房間配有一台電腦。

era.en: We live in the era of the internet.
era.zh: 我們生活在網路的時代。

establish.en: They established a new school in the town.
establish.zh: 他們在鎮上創立了一所新學校。

estimate.en: I estimate the trip will take two hours.
estimate.zh: 我估計這趟旅程要兩小時。

ethnic.en: The country has many ethnic groups.

evaluate.en: The teacher evaluated our work fairly.
evaluate.zh: 老師公平地評量我們的作業。

eventual.en: Hard work led to her eventual success.
eventual.zh: 努力帶來了她最終的成功。

evidence.zh: 警方找到了有力的證據。

evident.en: It was evident that he had lied.

exaggerate.en: Don't exaggerate; it wasn't that bad.

exception.en: Everyone was tired, with no exception.
exception.zh: 每個人都累了，無一例外。

exhaust.zh: 長途健行讓我們筋疲力盡。

exhibit.en: The museum will exhibit old paintings.
exhibit.zh: 博物館將展出古老的畫作。

expand.en: The company plans to expand overseas.
expand.zh: 這家公司計畫向海外擴張。

expansion.en: The expansion of the city took years.
expansion.zh: 這座城市的擴張花了好幾年。

experimental.en: The doctor tried an experimental drug.
experimental.zh: 醫生嘗試了一種實驗性的藥物。

explosion.en: The explosion shook the whole street.

explosive.zh: 工人處理爆炸性的材料。

expose.en: Don't expose your skin to too much sun.

exposure.en: Long exposure to the sun is harmful.
exposure.zh: 長時間曝曬陽光是有害的。

extend.en: They extended the deadline by a week.
extend.zh: 他們把截止日延後了一週。

extent.en: To some extent, I agree with you.
extent.zh: 在某種程度上我同意你。

facial.zh: 她有著柔和的臉部五官。

facility.en: The sports facility has a swimming pool.
facility.zh: 這個運動設施有游泳池。

faithful.en: The dog is a faithful friend.

fame.zh: 這位歌手的名聲迅速傳開。

fantastic.en: We had a fantastic time at the show.
fantastic.zh: 我們在表演中玩得超開心。

fantasy.en: The book is a fantasy about dragons.
fantasy.zh: 這本書是關於龍的奇幻故事。

farewell.en: We said farewell to our teacher.

favorable.en: The weather was favorable for the trip.

fax.en: She sent the document by fax.

feast.en: They enjoyed a feast on the holiday.
feast.zh: 他們在假日享用了一頓盛宴。

feedback.zh: 老師給了有幫助的回饋。

ferry.en: We took a ferry to the island.

fertile.en: Crops grow well in fertile soil.
fertile.zh: 作物在肥沃的土壤裡長得好。

fetch.zh: 那隻狗把樹枝叼了回來。

fierce.en: A fierce dog guarded the gate.
fierce.zh: 一隻兇猛的狗守著大門。

fireplace.en: We sat by the warm fireplace.
fireplace.zh: 我們坐在溫暖的壁爐旁。

flatter.en: He flattered her to get a favor.

flea.en: The dog scratched because of a flea.
flea.zh: 那隻狗因為跳蚤而抓癢。

flee.en: The people fled from the flood.

flexible.en: Her schedule is flexible this week.
flexible.zh: 她這週的行程很有彈性。

fluent.en: She is fluent in three languages.
fluent.zh: 她能流利地說三種語言。

flush.en: Please flush the toilet after use.

foam.en: White foam covered the top of the wave.
foam.zh: 白色泡沫覆蓋在浪頭上。

forbid.en: The rules forbid running in the hall.

forecast.en: The weather forecast says it will rain.

formation.en: We studied the formation of clouds.

formula.en: He used a formula to solve the problem.
formula.zh: 他用公式解出了這道題。

fort.zh: 士兵們守衛著那座古老的堡壘。

fortunate.en: We were fortunate to find a seat.
fortunate.zh: 我們很幸運找到了座位。

fossil.zh: 他們發現了一塊恐龍化石。

foundation.en: A house needs a strong foundation.

founder.en: She is the founder of the company.
founder.zh: 她是這家公司的創辦人。

fragile.en: Handle the fragile glass with care.

frame.en: She put the photo in a wooden frame.

frequency.en: The buses run at a high frequency.

freshman.en: He is a freshman at the university.

frost.en: Frost covered the window this morning.

frown.en: She frowned at the bad news.
frown.zh: 聽到壞消息她皺起了眉頭。

frustrate.zh: 緩慢的電腦讓他很沮喪。

fulfill.en: He worked hard to fulfill his dream.
fulfill.zh: 他努力工作以實現夢想。

functional.en: The old machine is still functional.

furious.en: He was furious about the broken window.
furious.zh: 他為了破掉的窗戶大發雷霆。

furnish.zh: 他們為新公寓添置了家具。

furthermore.en: It is cheap; furthermore, it is well made.
furthermore.zh: 它很便宜，而且做工精良。

gallery.en: We saw modern art at the gallery.
gallery.zh: 我們在畫廊看了現代藝術。

gaze.en: She gazed at the stars for a long time.

gear.en: He changed the gear to go faster.

gender.en: The job is open to people of any gender.
gender.zh: 這份工作不分性別都可應徵。

gene.en: Eye color is decided by our genes.
gene.zh: 眼睛的顏色由我們的基因決定。

generation.en: Three generations live in this house.
generation.zh: 三代人住在這棟房子裡。

generosity.zh: 她的慷慨幫助了許多人。

genius.en: The young boy is a math genius.
genius.zh: 這個小男孩是數學天才。

genuine.en: She showed genuine concern for others.
genuine.zh: 她對別人展現了真誠的關心。

gifted.en: He is a gifted young pianist.
gifted.zh: 他是個有天分的年輕鋼琴家。

gigantic.en: A gigantic wave hit the boat.

giggle.en: The girls giggled at the joke.
giggle.zh: 女孩們聽了笑話咯咯笑。

ginger.en: She added ginger to the soup.

glimpse.en: I caught a glimpse of the star.
glimpse.zh: 我瞥見了那位明星一眼。

globe.en: She pointed to Japan on the globe.
globe.zh: 她在地球儀上指出日本。

glorious.en: It was a glorious sunny morning.
glorious.zh: 那是個燦爛晴朗的早晨。

gown.en: She wore a long evening gown.

graceful.en: The swan looked graceful on the water.

gracious.en: Our host was warm and gracious.
gracious.zh: 我們的主人既熱情又親切。

graduation.en: Her family came to her graduation.
graduation.zh: 她的家人來參加她的畢業典禮。

grammar.zh: 良好的文法使寫作清楚。

grammatical.en: Check your essay for grammatical errors.
grammatical.zh: 檢查你的作文有沒有文法錯誤。

graph.en: The graph shows the rise in temperature.
graph.zh: 這張圖表顯示溫度的上升。

grateful.en: I am grateful for your kindness.

gratitude.en: She expressed her gratitude with a card.
gratitude.zh: 她用卡片表達她的感激。

greasy.en: The fried food was too greasy.

greeting.en: A smile is a friendly greeting.

grief.en: She was full of grief at the funeral.

grind.en: They grind the beans to make coffee.
grind.zh: 他們把豆子磨碎來煮咖啡。

guarantee.en: The store guarantees the product for a year.

guardian.en: Her aunt is her legal guardian.
guardian.zh: 她的阿姨是她的法定監護人。

guilt.en: He felt guilt for telling a lie.
guilt.zh: 他因為說謊而感到內疚。

gulf.en: The boat sailed across the gulf.

habitual.en: He is a habitual early riser.

halt.en: The car came to a sudden halt.

handwriting.en: Her handwriting is neat and clear.

hardship.en: They faced many hardships during the war.
hardship.zh: 戰爭期間他們面臨許多艱難。

harmony.en: The two families live in harmony.

harsh.en: The harsh winter killed many plants.
harsh.zh: 嚴酷的冬天凍死了許多植物。

haste.en: In his haste, he forgot his keys.
haste.zh: 匆忙之中他忘了帶鑰匙。

hasten.en: She hastened to finish the work.

hatred.zh: 仇恨只會帶來更多痛苦。

hawk.en: A hawk circled high above the field.
hawk.zh: 一隻鷹在田野上空盤旋。

helicopter.en: A helicopter rescued the lost climbers.
helicopter.zh: 一架直升機救出了迷路的登山客。

herd.en: A herd of cows crossed the road.

hive.en: Bees live together in a hive.

homeland.en: He missed his homeland while abroad.

honeymoon.en: They went to Italy for their honeymoon.

hook.en: He hung his coat on the hook.

horizon.en: The sun set below the horizon.

horrify.en: The scary movie horrified the children.
horrify.zh: 那部恐怖片嚇壞了孩子們。

hose.en: He watered the garden with a hose.

household.en: Cleaning is a daily household task.

housework.en: We share the housework at home.

humanity.en: Clean air matters to all of humanity.
humanity.zh: 乾淨的空氣對全人類都很重要。

humidity.en: The humidity is high in summer.

hydrogen.en: Water is made of hydrogen and oxygen.

idiom.en: 'Break a leg' is an English idiom.

idle.en: The machine sat idle all day.

idol.en: The singer is the teen's idol.
idol.zh: 這位歌手是青少年的偶像。

ignorance.en: His mistake came from ignorance, not anger.
ignorance.zh: 他的錯誤源於無知，而非生氣。

ignorant.en: He was ignorant of the new rules.

illustrate.en: She used a story to illustrate the point.
illustrate.zh: 她用一個故事來說明重點。

illustration.zh: 這本書有色彩繽紛的插圖。

imaginary.en: The child has an imaginary friend.
imaginary.zh: 這個孩子有個想像中的朋友。
